title: Magnetic loop
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''magnetic loop''' was a phenomenon of [[Star/Legends|stellar]] activity in a star's [[chromosphere]]. In [[3986 BBY]], [[Vima Sunrider]]'s hijacked ion [[Mining/Legends|mining]] ship was caught in a magnetic loop, placing her in danger.

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 1|''Tales of the Jedi – Redemption'' 1]]

[[Category:Astrophysics]]
